framework_stage1.root_cause: APPLET-5 now uses its vendored-relative compiler symbol and passes under _hermes_mantle_vendor. The authoritative core and complete 146-file non-addon vendor snapshot are byte-aligned.

verification_warnings: MacroDroid YAML parses successfully; MacroDroid semantic import/runtime correctness remains unverified.

satisfied_requirements.evidence: All fourteen addon Stage-1 rows passed on an isolated resident.

Dual flush, addon whole-resident atomic publication, verified reload, SELF continuity, and nine-organ reconstruction passed. Core Organism.save publishes each owner-only artifact through same-directory atomic replacement; whole-tree publication remains a documented standalone limitation.

Both addon tools dispatch through model_tools.handle_function_call and twelve real Hermes hooks dispatch through PluginManager as fail-open observers; profile/home/config isolation and raw host payload exclusion passed.
mantle_record_discovery is confined to one unverified discovery plus a BODY-authored proof.

C-01 through C-11 passed; steering, inferred discovery, and cultivation route through Limbs with BODY-authored proofs. Core fusion requires fresh Stage-1 evidence and target-bound APPROVED operator and guardian decisions.
Machine-readable operator and guardian records exist and fail closed with fusion DEFERRED.

Mantle 1.3.0 carries 111 invariants, parseable MacroDroid YAML, a 146-file reproducible non-addon vendor snapshot, a 339-file repository receipt, and strict optimization-audit bounded closure with no failing audits.

resolved_requirements.resolution: APPLET-5 is namespace-safe; the complete framework receipt is 20/20 rows and 111/111 invariants.

ResidentConfig.authorize_phase2 is the sole supported transition: it requires a complete fresh Stage-1 receipt and READY engineering verdict bound to resident identity and Body fingerprint, post-receipt target-bound APPROVED operator and guardian decisions, explicit effective MIND authorization, and explicit reproduction denial. Direct construction and Hermes config remain fail-closed; the live NOT_READY/DEFERRED records cannot enable Phase 2.
Core, vendor, addon, tests, and doctrine now state that Stage-1 is technical evidence and never fusion authority.

blocking_requirements.evidence: ResidentRuntime never builds the model transport, calls fuse(), owns a MIND lifecycle, or restores/defuses a fused state safely.
blocking_requirements.required_resolution: Implement an explicit, reversible fusion and defusion lifecycle without weakening the independently operable Body.

blocking_requirements.evidence: Core Heart now defines a 600-second natural interval and calls the fused MIND on every pulse; NOC-1..3 and SCHED-1 prove baseline plus additional interrupts. The addon has no legal fused lifecycle or runtime scheduler yet.
blocking_requirements.required_resolution: Add the addon/runtime ten-minute scheduler only after the legal Phase-2 lifecycle exists; preserve the autonomous Body and treat nociception only as additional wakeups.

blocking_requirements.evidence: The bounded OpenAI-compatible HTTP prototype still reads HERMES_MANTLE_API_KEY, HERMES_MANTLE_MODEL, and HERMES_MANTLE_URL directly; it is not Hermes-native routing.
blocking_requirements.required_resolution: Route MIND calls through Hermes's supported active provider/model abstraction without duplicating or persisting provider credentials.

blocking_requirements.evidence: The prototype caps one response and records sidecar usage but defines no ten-minute aggregate budget, retry/backoff policy, outage behavior, or durable bounded usage policy.
blocking_requirements.required_resolution: Define and verify cadence, token/cost budget, retries, backoff, outage behavior, and bounded usage receipts.

blocking_requirements.evidence: Both operator and guardian fusion decisions remain DEFERRED; Step-10 continuation was engineering authority only.
blocking_requirements.required_resolution: After every technical blocker is closed and readiness is reissued as READY, obtain separate new target-bound APPROVED fusion decisions from operator and guardian.

next_action.action: B-02 configuration transition is complete. Next separately scoped engineering step: B-03 reversible runtime fusion lifecycle. MIND fusion and reproduction remain prohibited under the live DEFERRED decisions.

decision_rule: This NOT_READY report authorizes no fusion action. A later READY report will still require separate explicit target-bound APPROVED decisions from operator and guardian.
